name: Emil Roby
summary: Energy and climate analyst focused on ESG strategy, sustainability reporting, and market intelligence.

experience.title: Senior ESG Analyst
experience.impact: Built decarbonization dashboards, led ESG reporting, and translated climate data into executive recommendations.

experience.title: Energy Markets Analyst
experience.impact: Analyzed renewable energy trends, tracked policy changes, and supported client strategy in power markets.

experience.title: Business Analyst
experience.impact: Developed market sizing models, automated KPI reporting, and synthesized customer and carbon data.
